title: hieracium bupleuroides subsp. schmidelyanum
intro: Hieracium bupleuroides subsp. schmidelyanum, commonly known as a species of hawkweed, is a flowering plant native to specific regions in Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium bupleuroides subsp. schmidelyanum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create teas or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
